Quest: Be my star!
\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
Are you up for another photoshoot?
\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Nope. I am not interested in it anymore.
Quest: Gangster Apprentice_Day two

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
Who are you?!

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Sorry to barge in like that. Your door was open. So I let myself in.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
No problem. And you are here for...?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I am looking for someone named Samuel. And I was told that it was his apartment.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
Yeah, it is. At least for now.
(\c[23]He looked a bit depressed.\c[0])

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
And yes, I am Samuel.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
Do you need something from me?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
\}Yeah, I'm here to collect your debt.\{
(\c[23]She mumbled under her breath.\c[0])

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
Sorry, I didn’t catch that.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
What are you talking about?
(\c[23]She took a deep breath and said...\c[0])

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
A man named T-Bag...umm, I mean T-Dog sent me.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
T-Dog sent you?!

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
You don’t look like one of his girls.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I am no one’s girl. I work for him. That's all.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
If you say so.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Hey! It's true!

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
Alright, alright. I believe you. Calm down.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
But I don’t have any money right now.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
Why don’t you come back later.
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] He is not taking me seriously.\c[0])
(\c[23]Jane tried again. This time tried to look more intimidating while speaking.\c[0])

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Hey! Give back what you owe right now.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Or, or I am gonna beat you up.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
Girl, I don't think you ever beat anyone in your life.
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] It’s not working. But I can't go empty-handed. Mr. Victor would never help me then.\c[0])
(\c[23]Jane realized intimidation is not her strong suit. Instead, she decided to use her brain.\c[0])

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Look, you are lucky T-Dog sent me.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
If he sent some brute, then he would have first beat the shit out of you and then asked you for his money.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
And if I go back empty-handed, this is whom he is gonna send.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
He is probably gonna charge you extra for wasting his time.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
You know what kind of man he is, right?

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
I know. But I don't have any money to spare.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
I am totally broke. All I have is the next month's rent for the apartment.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
But if I give it to you, I will be evicted.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Well, in my opinion, being homeless is better than broken bones.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
I suppose.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
I had such big dreams, you know.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
I wanted to become a photographer.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
That’s why I took a loan from T-Dog.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
Thought, I will pay him back once I make enough money from photography.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
What I didn't realize at that time, It also costs money to hire models.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
And I already spent all the money buying camera equipment.
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] Don’t get emotional. It doesn't matter to you. You have your own problem.\c[0])

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
I guess I have to move back to my parent's house.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
Oh boy, they are not going to be happy about it.
(\c[23]Then he took a good look at Jane.\c[0])

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
Hmm...

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
Will you do me a favor?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
No, whatever it is, absolutely not.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I am here just to collect the money.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
There is already too much on my plate.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
Please, I beg you. Just hear me out.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
After that, you can make your decision.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
(Sigh)

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Alright. What do you want?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
If you want me to talk to T-Dog about giving you more time, I don't think that will be possible.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
No, no, nothing like that.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Then what?

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
I don't know if anyone told you that, but you are a gorgeous girl.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Umm, thanks, I guess.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
No, seriously, you are the most beautiful girl I have seen in my life.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Now you are making me blush.
(\c[23]She said as she was actually blushing.\c[0])

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
Have you...have you ever tried modeling?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
No, I don’t think I have.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
Why not?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Because I thought education was more important than showing off your body.

\c[1]Samuel:\c[0]
No, no, you got it completely wrong. Modeling is so much more than that.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
It’s an art.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
It represents the divine beauty of a woman.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Aren’t you full of yourself.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
I am telling the truth.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
Please, become my model.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I can’t, I can’t do this.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
Why not?
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] Yeah, why not? Unlike all the jobs I did in the last few days, modeling is pretty decent.\c[0])

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Will I get paid?

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
Not right away, of course.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
But once I get enough money from selling your photos, you will get your cut.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Who is going to pay for my photos anyway?

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
Well, there are advertising companies that might be interested in hiring you for commercials.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
Also, some websites pay for stock images of different things.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
If some advertising company hires me, how is it benefiting you?

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
Well, they will find you from my photos. Which means they are also impressed with my photography skill.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
It will boast my reputation.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
Because only a good photographer can flash out the true beauty of his model.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
And are you a good photographer?

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
Of course I am. Photography is my passion.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
I swear, you won't regret it if you work with me.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Hmm...
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] I did lots of things in the last few days, things I never thought I would do in my life.\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] Why don’t I give it a shot too.\c[0])

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Alright, I will do it.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
But if you try to do something pervy...

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
Why would I do that?!

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Because it’s the nature of you man.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
I don't know what kind of man you came across, But I am nothing like that.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
You will see. I am a true professional.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Alright. When do you wanna do it?

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
How about right now?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Now! But I have to prepare.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
You don’t have to do much.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
Just stand in front of the camera and make some sexy pose.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
I’ll take care of the rest.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Don't we need to go to the photo studio for the photoshoot?

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
My apartment is the studio.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
Didn't I say I spent all the money buying camera equipment?

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
That includes studio equipment too.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
Just come inside. You will see for yourself.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
I want to thank you again for agreeing to this.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Well, it will benefit me too, right?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
If I become a model.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
Yeah, yeah, sure.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
But if you are really serious about it, then one photoshoot won't cut it.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
We have to shoot multiple times.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I am okay with it. just tell me when.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
Sure. But first, let me show some people the photos I took today.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Who are those people exactly?

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
You know, I have contact everywhere.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
Like talent scout, producer, directors etc.
(\c[23]Of course he was lying through his teeth.\c[0])
(\c[23]He had something else in his mind.\c[0])

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
I will show your photos to them. And if someone ends up liking you, then it's a jackpot!

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Really?!

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
Of course. Have some faith.
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] Is it really happening?! Can I really become a supermodel?!\c[0])

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
If...if you can really make that happen, then I will be forever in your debt.
(\c[2]Samuel:\c[23] hmm, she sounds very desperate. I could use that to my advantage.\c[0])

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
Oh, I can make that happen, but I will need your cooperation.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Anything, I will do anything if it means I get to enjoy a better life.
(\c[2]Samuel:\c[23] Hmm interesting!\c[0])

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
Well, you already showed your determination by agreeing to let me take photos without your top.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Yeah, It was a bit embarrassing.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
But I thought it would be worth it if it could help me become a model.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
And you are absolutely right!

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
I need this kind of attitude from you going forward.
(\c[2]Samuel:\c[23] Looks like she is totally on board! It will be very easy for me to manipulate her in any way I want.\c[0])
(\c[2]Samuel:\c[23] Finally my luck is turning around!\c[0])

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
If you really are that determined, then you need to show it.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Like how?

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
Well, when I asked you to do a topless shoot, you weren't able to do it.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
But if you wanna be a supermodel, then you have to be prepared to go any length necessary.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Why don't you first show the photos you already took to your contacts.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
If it doesn't work out, then I might reconsider.
(\c[2]Samuel:\c[23] Oh, don’t worry. It won’t work.\c[0])
(\c[2]Samuel:\c[23] I will definitely find a way to get you naked.\c[0])

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
Well then, in that case, we will see what happens in the future.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
So anyway, I guess I should leave now.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
Alright.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
And definitely check in with me later. I will let you know what my contacts think about you.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Yeah, sure.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
But umm...before I leave, you still owe me some money.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
You mean the money I borrowed from T-Dog?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Yeah. I can't go back to him empty-handed.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
I suppose I could give you the money I was saving to pay the rent.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
But then how would you pay the rent?

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
I should be able to make some money by selling the photos I shoot today.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
I can use it to pay my bills.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
But then I won't be able to pay you for today's photoshoot.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
It’s okay. You already gave me a bikini set.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I will take it as my payment.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
Thank you very much for your consideration.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Don’t mention it. You are helping me too.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Maybe one day I will become a superstar.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
And it’s all thanks to you.
(\c[2]Samuel:\c[23] I hate to give her false hope. But I need her to fulfill my own ambition.\c[0])
(\c[2]Samuel:\c[23] I have to suck it up and do what is best for me.\c[0])
(\c[2]Samuel:\c[23] Sometimes, you need to let go of your morality. The world is cruel like this.\c[0])

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
looks like we are helping each other.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
It must be fate that you came here today.

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
But anyway, here you go.
MessageRows 1
\>You have received \c[4]T-Dog's\c[0] money.
MessageRows 4

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
That should keep him and his goons away from me.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Alright. I will see you later then.
\>After Jane Left...

\c[2]Samuel:\c[0]
